NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastItem
IComparable​<AppCastItem>
[Serializable]
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastItem

Item from a Sparkle app cast file with information about the download, release notes, etc.

Variables
_semVerLikeCache
private SemVerLike? _semVerLikeCache
_version
private string? _version
DefaultMIMEType
public static string DefaultMIMEType

Default MIME type for an App Cast Item (application/octet-stream)

DefaultOperatingSystem
public static string DefaultOperatingSystem

Default operating system for an App Cast Item (windows)

Functions
AppCastItem
public AppCastItem()

Default constructor for an app cast item

Properties
Title
[JsonPropertyName("title")]
public string? Title {
get;
set
}

The item title

Version
[JsonPropertyName("version")]
public string? Version {
get;
set
}

The available version -- this technically can be null if file parsing fails, but since NetSparkleUpdater runs off of version information, doing this is not a great way to use this library.

SemVerLikeVersion
[JsonIgnore]
public SemVerLike SemVerLikeVersion {
get
}

The available version as a SemVerLike object (handles things like 1.2-alpha1)

ShortVersion
[JsonPropertyName("short_version")]
public string? ShortVersion {
get;
set
}

Shortened version

ReleaseNotesLink
[JsonPropertyName("release_notes_link")]
public string? ReleaseNotesLink {
get;
set
}

The release notes link

ReleaseNotesSignature
[JsonPropertyName("release_notes_signature")]
public string? ReleaseNotesSignature {
get;
set
}

The signature of the Release Notes file

Description
[JsonPropertyName("description")]
public string? Description {
get;
set
}

The embedded description

DownloadLink
[JsonPropertyName("url")]
public string? DownloadLink {
get;
set
}

The download link

DownloadSignature
[JsonPropertyName("signature")]
public string? DownloadSignature {
get;
set
}

The signature of the download file

PublicationDate
[JsonPropertyName("publication_date")]
public DateTime PublicationDate {
get;
set
}

Date item was published

IsCriticalUpdate
[JsonPropertyName("is_critical")]
public bool IsCriticalUpdate {
get;
set
}

Whether the update was marked critical or not via sparkle:critical

UpdateSize
[JsonPropertyName("size")]
public long UpdateSize {
get;
set
}

Length of update set via sparkle:length (usually the # of bytes of the update)

OperatingSystem
[JsonPropertyName("os")]
public string? OperatingSystem {
get;
set
}

Operating system that this update applies to

Channel
[JsonPropertyName("channel")]
public string? Channel {
get;
set
}

Channel for this app cast item. A channel can also be set in the version property via semver, and when using , both the channel and version data will be used when filtering channels for this app cast item.  Often a single word like "beta", "gamma", "rc", etc. Note that this can be an empty string, but "stable" or "release" will be treated as a special channel, NOT as a "normal" channel for all users.

IsWindowsUpdate
[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsWindowsUpdate {
get
}

True if this update is a windows update; false otherwise.  Acceptable OS strings contain "win" or "windows" (this is checked with a case-insensitive check). If not specified, the OS assumed to be a Windows update.

IsMacOSUpdate
[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsMacOSUpdate {
get
}

True if this update is a macOS update; false otherwise.  Acceptable OS strings contain "mac", "osx", or "macos" (this is checked with a case-insensitive check). If not specified, the OS is assumed to be a Windows update.

IsLinuxUpdate
[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsLinuxUpdate {
get
}

True if this update is a macOS update; false otherwise.  Acceptable OS strings contain "linux" (this is checked with a case-insensitive check). If not specified, the OS is assumed to be a Windows update.

MIMEType
[JsonPropertyName("type")]
public string MIMEType {
get;
set
}

MIME type for file as specified in the closure tag. Defaults to "application/octet-stream".

Functions
CompareTo
public int CompareTo(
AppCastItem? 
other
)

Compares this AppCastItem version to the version of another AppCastItem.  If versions are the same, uses channel, then title to sort.

Parameter
other
AppCastItem?

the other instance

Returns

-1, 0, 1 if this instance is less than, equal to, or greater than the other

Equals
public override bool Equals(
object? 
obj
)

See if this this AppCastItem version equals the version of another AppCastItem.  Also checks to make sure the application names match.

Parameter
obj
object?

the instance to compare to

GetHashCode
public override int GetHashCode()

Derive hashcode from immutable variables

Returns

the integer haschode of this app cast item

Operators
operator ==
public static bool operator ==(
AppCastItem? 
left,
AppCastItem? 
right
)

Check the equality of two AppCastItem instances

Parameters
left
AppCastItem?

first AppCastItem to compare

right
AppCastItem?

second AppCastItem to compare

Returns

True if items are the same; false otherwise

operator !=
public static bool operator !=(
AppCastItem? 
left,
AppCastItem? 
right
)

Check if two AppCastItem instances are different

Parameters
left
AppCastItem?

first AppCastItem to compare

right
AppCastItem?

second AppCastItem to compare

Returns

True if items are different; false if they are the same

operator <
public static bool operator <(
AppCastItem 
left,
AppCastItem 
right
)

Less than comparison of version between two AppCastItem instances

Parameters
left
AppCastItem

first AppCastItem to compare

right
AppCastItem

second AppCastItem to compare

Returns

True if left version is less than right version; false otherwise

operator <=
public static bool operator <=(
AppCastItem 
left,
AppCastItem 
right
)

Less than or equal to comparison of version between two AppCastItem instances

Parameters
left
AppCastItem

AppCastItem to compare

right
AppCastItem

AppCastItem to compare

Returns

True if left version is less than or equal to right version

AppCastItem 
left,
AppCastItem 
right
)

left
AppCastItem

first AppCastItem to compare

AppCastItem

second AppCastItem to compare

Returns

True if left version is greater than right version; false otherwise

AppCastItem 
left,
AppCastItem 
right

Greater than or equal to comparison of version between two AppCastItem instances

left
AppCastItem

first AppCastItem to compare

right
AppCastItem

second AppCastItem to compare

Returns

True if left version is greater than or equal to right version; false otherwise
